statement: In every magma, Equation 1954 (`x = (y * (y * z)) * (w * y)`) implies Equation 1000 (`x = y * ((z * w) * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0264
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y z)) (op w y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) (op y y)))
